description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 3, 2026 (Reiwa 8), Friday, under clear skies, the Surugadai University entrance ceremony took place. I attended as a guest and offered congratulatory remarks.

To all of you who have been admitted: congratulations on your enrollment. I sincerely hope that you will enjoy a fulfilling student life—studying, participating in sports, and engaging in cultural activities—within the university's spacious campus and amid our city's blessed natural environment. I also extend my heartfelt wishes for the good health and happiness of all those present, and for Surugadai University's continued growth and success.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13407.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Surugadai University entrance ceremony, Reiwa 8 (2026)
